title: Bayview Reviews - Niche
content: # Bayview. My family has lived in Bayview San Francisco for generations, and I love it. It's a part of the city where tourists never dare to visit, so the neighborhood's rich culture, traditions, and pride are unmatched. I love taking the bus with my friends to our favorite spots and exploring parts of the city that don't get a lot of traction. If I could change one thing about Bayview, it would be the safety. It is obvious that this is the biggest thing I don't like about this neighborhood. This area of San Francisco has not always been discussed in a positive light, but after thriving in the district for already a year, I am proud to say that the Bayview has many pros. I have lived in the Bayview for the past 4 years, and although there has been a lot of growth in the neighborhood such as coffee shops, grocery store, and breweries, there's a lack of restaurants and accessibility to clean and safe recreational places.

title: Bayview Gateway Park
content: Bayview Gateway Park is in the Bayview neighborhood at the corner of Cargo Way and 3rd Street. The park is also home to San Francisco Fire Department Station

title: Gateway from Hell
content: Gateway construction raises concerns about heavy traffic congestion, air pollution from diesel emissions and environmental racism
